title: Insomnia 2 Season Pack
description: The official modpack for the game on the Insomnia 2 Season server and on other servers
body:
The official mod pack for playing on all existing servers, but was originally created for its own server (later it was reformed for all types of servers).

It is well optimized for playing on both PCs and weak laptops.

Modpack is designed for players who like vanilla game, but with minor additions and improvements

One of the advantages of this modpack is good compatibility with optifine resource packs and texture packs.

Mod pack allows you to significantly increase fps in the game without losing performance.



Language support: English, Russian

Mods list: 1) 3D Skin Layers 2) AdvancementInfo 3) Advancement Plaques [Fabric] 4) AmbientSounds 5 6) Animatica 7) Architectury API 8) Auudio [Fabric] 9) Axolotl Bucket Fix 10) BetterF3 11) Better Statistics Screen (Fabric) 12) Blur (Fabric) 13) Bookshelf 14) Custom Entity Models 15) Chat Heads 16) Cherished Worlds (Fabric) 17) Chunk Copy (Fabric) 18) Cloth API (Fabric) 19) Cloth Config API 20) Continuity 21) CreativeCore 22) CriticaLib 23) Damage Indicator Mod 24) Drippy Loading Screen [Fabric] 25) [Effective ?](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/effective) 26) EMI 27) Emotecraft 28) Enchantment Descriptions 29) Entity Texture Features 30) ExtraSounds 31) Fabric API 32) Fabric Language Kotlin 33) FancyMenu [Fabric] 34) FerriteCore 35) Forge Config API Port 36) ForgetMeChunk 37) Iceberg [Fabric] 38) Indium 39) Inventory HUD+ 40) Iris Shaders 41) Item Model Fix 42) ItemPhysic Full 43) JamLib 44) Keymap 45) Konkrete [Fabric] 46) Krypton 47) LambDynamicLights 48) LazyDFU 49) Litematica 50) Lithium 51) MaLiLib 52) Memory Leak Fix 53) Mod Menu 54) Presence Footsteps 55) RightClickHarvest 56) Show Me Your Skin! 57) ShulkerBoxTooltip [Fabric/Forge] 58) Smooth Boot (Fabric) 59) Sodium Extra 60) Sodium 61) Starlight (Fabric) 62) Stendhal 63) Tool Stats 64) Visuality 65) Simple Voice Chat 66) YDM's Weapon Master 67) Where Is It 68) [Xaero's World Map](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/xaeros-world-map) 69) [Xaero's Minimap](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/xaeros-minimap) 70) Zoomify There is support for shaders thanks to [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) and [Iris](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris)

Resource packs in the assembly: 1) [Default_Dark_Mode](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/default-dark-mode) (Disabled by default) 2) [BetterVanillaBuilding](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bettervanillabuilding) (Disabled by default) 3) [Icons](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/icons) (Disabled by default)

P.S. Once you are in the game turn up your video settings to your liking and change the GUI Scale to 3
